pr_text:
## Title: Fix mutex deadlock in WLS memory allocation error path

### Summary
Fix a concurrency bug in the WLS (Wireline Simulation) integration layer that could cause F1AP interface message loss or corruption. In `wls_mac_alloc_buffer()`, when memory allocation fails, the function was calling `wls_mac_print_stats()` while still holding the `lock_alloc` mutex. This violates proper lock discipline and can lead to deadlocks when other threads attempt to acquire the same lock during stats printing
